name: sirius
description: The fleet foreman for AI coding agents. Ships the Sirius worker Skill so Claude Code runs the claim → map → lock → brief → work → gate → receipt → release loop against your local Ametrite board and Hayvenhurst code graph, plus installers for the `sirius` CLI binary and the whole Sothis suite (/sirius:install-suite, "let's Sothis this up").
